verses.1: LORD, don’t rebuke me in your wrath,
verses.2: For your arrows have pierced me,
verses.3: There is no soundness in my flesh because of your indignation,
verses.4: For my iniquities have gone over my head.
verses.5: My wounds are loathsome and corrupt
verses.6: I am in pain and bowed down greatly.
verses.7: For my waist is filled with burning.
verses.8: I am faint and severely bruised.
verses.9: Lord, all my desire is before you.
verses.11: My lovers and my friends stand aloof from my plague.
verses.12: They also who seek after my life lay snares.
verses.13: But I, as a deaf man, don’t hear.
verses.14: Yes, I am as a man who doesn’t hear,
verses.15: For I hope in you, LORD.
verses.16: For I said, “Don’t let them gloat over me,
verses.17: For I am ready to fall.
verses.18: For I will declare my iniquity.
verses.19: But my enemies are vigorous and many.
verses.20: They who give evil for good are also adversaries to me,
